description: Tracks every content idea generated, angle used, and post status to avoid repetition and build on what works.

ideas.title: Elena was born 3 days ago
ideas.angle: No lesson, no framework, no business pivot. Pure human moment — newborn daughter, 9 hours sleep in 72, wife as superhero. Closing line 'She has no idea what she's done to me' lands on both Elena and his wife.
ideas.hook: My daughter Elena was born 3 days ago.
ideas.notes: Edu's raw story about Elena's birth. Rejected: 'kids bring luck' angle (too thin), 'founder detachment' angle (survivorship bias). Winner: angle C — just the moment, no lesson.
